title: Paphiopedilum caricinum
taxonomy: Paphiopedilum caricinum is classified as a species of orchid, specifically within the genus Paphiopedilum. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae and is native to Southeast Asia. Paphiopedilum caricinum is often referred to as a " Venus slipper orchid" due to its unique flower shape. This species is further categorized within the section Paphiopedilum, which includes other slipper orchids. The classification of Paphiopedilum caricinum is subject to ongoing research and may be refined in the future.
